---
name: New keyboard layout
about: Request or propose a Microsoft keyboard layout that isn't included yet
labels: layout
---

**Layout name**
The exact Microsoft keyboard layout name (see
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/globalization/windows-keyboard-layouts).

**Have you checked it isn't already included?**
See [`docs/keyboard-layouts.md`](../../docs/keyboard-layouts.md) for the full current list.

**Are you able to submit the layout data yourself?**
If yes, see [`docs/sample-layout.md`](../../docs/sample-layout.md) for the expected shape and open
a PR directly - it'll likely get merged faster than waiting on someone else to build it from a
request.
